name: @wavex-os/claude-code-proxy
description: Local Anthropic-compatible HTTP proxy that routes /v1/messages calls through Supabase Realtime to the operator's Mac. Customers point Claude Code at this proxy via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL — Claude Code thinks it's talking to Anthropic directly, but every LLM call bills against the operator's Claude Max subscription via Pool B. Fakes SSE streaming on top of the non-streaming Realtime round-trip.
